title: phacelia humilis var. dudleyi
intro: Phacelia humilis var. dudleyi, a rare and lesser-known variety of the Phacelia plant, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phacelia humilis var. dudleyi are thought to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it is also sometimes used in topical ointments and salves.
